name: commerce
description: Conformance vectors for the mapper-boundary finality-synthesis guard exported by @peac/adapter-core. Documents the C-001 through C-020 requirement IDs that govern the no-finality-synthesis rule across all PEAC commerce mappings (paymentauth, ACP, UCP, Stripe SPT, x402).

positive.description: Inputs that satisfy the guard under all modes (strict, interop, legacy)

negative-finality-synthesis.description: Inputs that attempt to set a finality-bearing event without an explicit upstream artifact. MUST throw MapperBoundaryError in ALL modes (strict, interop, legacy).

negative-silent-fallbacks.description: Inputs that include silent fallbacks (currency UNKNOWN/empty; defaulted env). MUST throw under strict mode; warn under interop; silent under legacy.

cross-rail-equivalence.description: Equivalent commerce action modeled across rails (paymentauth, ACP, UCP, Stripe SPT, x402) MUST produce the same evidence shape under the guard.

invariants: Mappings MUST preserve raw upstream artifacts and MUST NOT synthesize payment finality from non-payment artifacts or lifecycle states alone.
MapperBoundaryError carries the stable string code commerce.finality_synthesis_blocked.
Default mode is interop; strict mode is opt-in by caller; legacy mode preserves historical behavior.
Rule 1 (finality event without explicit upstream artifact) rejects in ALL modes.
Rules 2 and 3 (silent currency fallback, defaulted env) reject only in strict; warn in interop; silent in legacy.
